See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 24910 => 'Sudatel', 24911 => 'Sudatel', 24912 => 'Sudatel', 24990 => 'Zain', 24991 => 'Zain', 24992 => 'MTN', 24993 => 'MTN', 24995 => 'Network of The World Ltd', 24996 => 'Zain', 24999 => 'MTN', ];
